product.name: Men's Gray Sweatshirt with Black Logo
product.description: This well-loved sweatshirt is the perfect addition to any man's wardrobe. It has a crew neck, and it's made from air-jet spun yarn and quarter-turned fabric, which eliminates a center crease, reduces pilling, and gives the sweatshirt a soft, comfortable feel.

seo.title: Commerce Layer Store
